summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Waypoint Studio GPX route maker app. Backend APIs fully functional (13/13 tests passed), frontend UI working well with successful integration testing. Fixed critical GPX export bug during testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height console warnings on initial render
ui_bugs.impact: Console warnings only, chart renders correctly

passed_tests: Backend health API returns ok status
Route solving with cycling profile (OSRM bike routing)
Route solving with running profile (OSRM foot routing)
Elevation data fetching via Open-Meteo API
GPX file export with proper XML structure
Route CRUD operations (save, list, get, delete)
Frontend app loading with all components visible
Activity type selector toggles between cycling and running
Route stats display (distance, duration, elevation gain/loss)
Save route dialog and route persistence
Load route dialog with saved routes list
Map controls (zoom in/out, locate, fit route)
Route name editing in top bar
